## Collaboration Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, `runtime/`, live payloads, provider cache, or asset bundles are included
- [ ] If API contract changed, I updated the docs under `sourcing-ai-agent/docs/`
- [ ] If API contract changed, I included example request/response payloads in this PR
- [ ] If schema changed, I included migration files and rollback notes
- [ ] If env/config changed, I updated example config or docs
- [ ] If the feature is incomplete, it is behind a feature flag or default-off path
